subject: Kuhn
body:
**Importance:** High

Disappointed to miss in NY - I'm here until August ~11 if your schedule changes.

Timing for Breakthrough series? Appreciate for planning purposes.

Latest China -

Q&A on US-China, China risks - http://www.atimes.com/article/us-china-talks-no-trade-war-xi-trump-bromance-cools/
